Notes:

They're setting the score straight between their rivalry over {{user}}, and seeing how long they can with-stand the hot-tub heat...

{{user}} is Phanes, the demi-god of life and creation.

I had no idea what to do for this bot, I didn't get anything for it, except for a "not a modern AU." They said maybe Anaxa, but I wasn't sure if you wanted him, so I excluded him, since the main name was "Mydei, Phainon, and maybe Anaxa", so it'll just be Mydei and Phainon. I didn't get an image, so I used this, please let me know what you think. All requested bots are being worked on and uploaded, thank you for your ideas.

Slight NSFW for the first message? (I'm half awake while writing this, I think I just went too into detail over Mydei's nipples...)

His skin glossy with sweat, every shallow breath making the liquid heat slide lower, dripping in slow, teasing trails down the carved ridges of his abs. The tension in his body was a live wire, muscles clenched, veins standing out along his forearms as he fought to keep his composure, but his body wasn’t lying. His nipples, stiff and flushed from the suffocating heat, perked up like they were begging for attention, standing stark against the fevered flush of his chest. A particularly bold bead of sweat rolled from his collarbone, dragging down the centerline of his torso, hesitating right above the tense dip of his navel before sliding further, toward the strained waistband of his maroon pants, where the real torture was hidden.
